metric: Phase 7C native component capture compared to intentionally regenerated canonical references after local Rodger and Onest font parity. meanDelta is average RGB distance. mismatchRatio is the share of pixels with RGB distance above 0.08. Width, height, aspect, browser runtime, font readiness, deviceScaleFactor, and screenshot timing metadata are gated so layout or runtime drift cannot be hidden.

billing-toggle-button.notes: billing-toggle-button is gated against the intentionally regenerated Phase 7C canonical reference with local Rodger/Onest font parity, Chromium runtime metadata, deviceScaleFactor 1, and zero allowed geometry drift.
